titles.en: Distance between East and West as sun's daily travel

text: ٢٩٤. وَقَدْ سُئِلَ عَنْ مَسَافَةِ مَا بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ فَقَالَ (عليه السلام): مَسِيرَةُ يَوْمٍ لِلشَّمْسِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 294. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, was asked about the distance between East and West when he replied: One day’s travelling for the sun.
